prompt: {"type":"nine-photo promotional portrait grid","subject":{"gender_presentation":"feminine adult","hair":{"style":"long straight layered hair with a center part","color":"{argument name=\"hair color\" default=\"rainbow neon gradient\"}","details":"roots glowing red-orange, blending into yellow, lime green, cyan, blue, and pink-lilac through the lengths"},"clothing":"semi-sheer white button-up blouse","pose":"head-and-shoulders studio portrait, one hand raised with index finger touching the temple or side of the face, relaxed fashion pose","expression_set_count":9,"expression_direction":"create 9 distinct lively facial expressions while keeping the same person, styling, crop, and studio setup"},"image_style":{"look":"clean commercial talent headshots, polished promotional photography","lighting":"soft diffused studio lighting with gentle shadows","background":"plain light gray seamless backdrop","retouching":"high-end beauty retouching, natural skin texture, crisp hair detail","framing":"tight chest-up crop, centered subject, consistent framing across all 9 panels"},"layout":{"grid":"3x3","count":9,"sections":[{"title":"top row","position":"top","count":3,"labels":["gentle smile","bright open smile","calm neutral"]},{"title":"middle row","position":"middle","count":3,"labels":["soft laugh","thoughtful side glance","confident smirk"]},{"title":"bottom row","position":"bottom","count":3,"labels":["surprised delight","eyes-closed happy smile","slightly pouty cute expression"]}],"spacing":"thin even gaps between images, all panels equal size"},"prompt":"Create a 3x3 contact-sheet style set of 9 studio promotional portraits of the same {argument name=\"subject type\" default=\"woman\"}.
